rationale: The cited paper is methodologically central to the same problem space (estimating disaggregate/SKU choice with aggregate store shares, heterogeneity, and endogeneity), while the citing paper explicitly frames its contribution as a hierarchical Bayesian alternative to prior aggregate-data discrete-choice estimators. Both notes describe closely overlapping demand-estimation settings (including refrigerated orange juice), so this is plausibly a substantive method/foundation citation rather than a generic mention.
